arts.ttl: Amorim admits anxiety despite first Man Utd win
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says Manchester United are causing him to be "anxious" and "nervous" while the players get to grips with his tactical demands.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Bodo/Glimt predictions: Goals galore at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley expects excitement at both ends when Manchester United take on Bodo/Glimt for the very first time on Thursday.
